channel.title: Studies on Cyborg Support
channel.description: Recent content in Studies on Cyborg Support

item.title: Identity Study Group
item.description:
todo

  • hugo and git article
  • structured data format for bibliography
  • structured data format for glossary
  • structured data format for “knowledge graph” (source, notes, etc)

preliminary curation

over the next two weeks

  1. add books / readings we like
  2. each skim asynchronously find highlights we like, share them back with each other; surface and articulate what we like about the passages (topics, themes, motivations etc.)
  3. chat about the order of the syllabus
  4. convene in two weeks to finalize

misc notes

  • anchoring in indigenous perspectives
  • legibility; disappearences in Argentina;
  • *-nymity (anonymity, pseudonymity and more)
  • prioritize forkability, interfaces for people to get together and run with the idea
  • adjacent events and resources
  • the question of hashtags and other digital identity-ish constructs: what are they?

can we incorporate some natural lifecycles into the process? forking etc.? sunsets? as needed

fundamental meta-question: is “this” a “study group” or an inclusive participatory study process with healthy lifecycles and regenerative aspects, with coming and going, freedom, joy, etc
